title: Witty World (Beta)
description: A Fresh And Unique Resource Pack
body:
This Resource Pack Is My First Official Pack I Am Doing And I Will be Re-Texturing All The Blocks As I Go.

Texture Suggestions of what texture I should do next (only vanilla pls) : [https://discord.gg/Hqk2AfBtNs](https://discord.gg/Hqk2AfBtNs)
